zh.Saffron Walden, Essex, England: 英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登
zh.lifeSummary: Frances Gutter是Richard Gutter和Jane的女兒，於從1556年到1562年出生在英國艾可布萊崔。她於1570年與Mark Mott在英國結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1615年2月23日在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國艾可布萊崔。

zh-hans.Saffron Walden, Essex, England: 英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Frances Gutter是Richard Gutter和Jane的女儿，于从1556年到1562年出生在英国艾可布萊崔。她于1570年与Mark Mott在英国结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1615年2月23日在她的家乡，埋葬在英国艾可布萊崔。

nameMeanings.name: Gutter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Benzion, Zvi, Chaim, Hymie, Zalmen.
English: from the Middle English personal name Guthere, from ancient Germanic Gothari or Old English Gūthhere.

variants.name: Guetter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alexandre, Alphonse.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Frances Gutter was born from 1556 to 1562, in Braintree, Essex, England as the daughter of Richard Gutter and Jane. She married Mark Mott in 1570, in England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 23 February 1615, in her hometown, and was buried in Braintree, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Frances Gutter est née du 1556 au 1562, à Braintree, Essex, Angleterre, fille de Richard Gutter et Jane. Elle a épousé Mark Mott en 1570, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 février 1615, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Braintree, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Frances Gutter wurde von 1556 bis 1562 in Braintree, Essex, England, als Tochter von Richard Gutter und Jane geboren. Sie hat 1570 in England Mark Mott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Februar 1615 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Braintree, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Frances Gutter è nata il da 1556 a 1562 nel Braintree, Essex, England come figlia di Richard Gutter e Jane. Lei sposato Mark Mott nel 1570, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 febbraio 1615, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Braintree, Essex, England.

ja.Bocking, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスボクイング
ja.Shalford, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスシャルフォード

ja.Saffron Walden, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデン
ja.lifeSummary: Frances Gutterはから1556年まで1562年にイギリスエセックスブレイントレでRichard GutterとJaneの娘として生まれた。1570年にイギリスでMark Mottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1615年2月23日に故郷で死去し，イギリスエセックスブレイントレにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Gutter(은)는 1556년 부터 1562년 까지 영국 에세스 브레이트리에서 Richard Gutter(와)과 Jane의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1570년 영국에서 Mark Mott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1615년 2월 23일 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 브레이트리에 묻혔다.

lv.from 1556 to 1562–23 February 1615: no 1556. gada līdz 1562. gadam–1615. gada 23. februāris

pt.lifeSummary: Frances Gutter nasceu de 1556 a 1562, em Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra filha de Richard Gutter e Jane. Ela casou-se com Mark Mott em 1570, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1615, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Frances Gutter родилась с 1556 по 1562 в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия. Её родителей звали Richard Gutter и Jane. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Mark Mott в 1570 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 23 февраля 1615 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Frances Gutter nació desde 1556 hasta 1562, en Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra como hija de Richard Gutter y Jane. Se casó con Mark Mott en 1570, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de febrero de 1615, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra.
